    P : périmète, A : aire, V : volume.

        $\begin{tblr}{
                hlines,
                vlines,
                columns = {1cm, c},
                rows={1cm},
                cell{1}{1}={r=1,c=3}{c},
                cell{1}{4}={r=2,c=1}{c},
                cell{1}{5}={r=1,c=3}{c},
                column{4}={bg=gray!20},
                row{1,2}={bg=gray!20}}
                S  &     &    & k        & S' &    &    \\
                P  & A   & V  &          & P' & A' & V' \\
                50 & 125 &    &          & 10 &    & 8  \\
                10 &     & 15 & \sqrt{2} &    & 90 &    \\
